title: AES, Block Ciphers, and Primitive Boundaries · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible AES primitive boundary and known-answer harness with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in AES primitive boundary and known-answer harness and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Apply AES key-size and fixed block-size contracts without confusing key, block, message, and security strength.
Explain block-cipher keyed permutation behavior and why messages require an approved mode or higher-level construction.
Validate key and block lengths before using low-level AES APIs and convert panics or errors into bounded caller behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Aes Key Block Size
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 1951 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate AES key and block contracts with known-answer and implementation-boundary evidence; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply AES key-size and fixed block-size contracts without confusing key, block, message, and security strength.

Inspect the Crypto Go Aes Key Block Size trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.instruction:
